summary: Completed testing of P0-2 (Unsaved changes guard) and P2-1 (User role assignment bug fix). All features are working correctly.
passed_tests: P0-2: Integrations page - API Key dialog shows unsaved changes warning when closing with changes
P0-2: Integrations page - Webhook dialog shows unsaved changes warning when closing with changes
P0-2: SLA page - Create/Edit SLA dialog shows unsaved changes warning when closing with changes
P0-2: Email Settings page - Shows 'You have unsaved changes' text when form is modified
P0-2: Workflows page - Create Workflow dialog shows unsaved changes warning when closing with changes
P0-2: Workflows page - Duplicate Workflow dialog shows unsaved changes warning when closing with changes
P0-2: All unsaved changes dialogs have 'Stay' and 'Leave without saving' buttons
P0-2: 'Stay' button keeps dialog open with changes preserved
P0-2: 'Leave without saving' button closes dialog and discards changes
P2-1: Default role for new users is 'Requester' (not 'Editor') - BUG FIXED
P2-1: User can select different role (e.g., Video Editor) and user is created with that role
P2-1: Role selection dropdown shows all role types (System, Service Provider, Custom)
seed_data_creation: Created test users: TEST_RoleTest_User, TEST_AdminRole_User, TEST_EditorRole_User, TEST_VideoEditor_User (for role assignment testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-2 unsaved changes guard is implemented on all 4 pages (Integrations, SLA, EmailSettings, Workflows). For Integrations, SLA, and Workflows, it uses AlertDialog with 'Stay' and 'Leave without saving' buttons. For EmailSettings, it shows yellow warning text 'You have unsaved changes' above the Save button. P2-1 role assignment bug is fixed - default role is now 'Requester' instead of 'Editor', and users are created with the selected role correctly.

mocked_apis.SMTP_email_notifications: MOCKED - Email notifications logged to console instead of sent via SMTP

P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.integrations_api_key_dialog: WORKING - AlertDialog appears with Stay/Leave buttons when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.integrations_webhook_dialog: WORKING - AlertDialog appears with Stay/Leave buttons when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.sla_dialog: WORKING - AlertDialog appears with Stay/Leave buttons when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.email_settings_form: WORKING - Yellow warning text 'You have unsaved changes' appears when form is modified
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.workflows_create_dialog: WORKING - AlertDialog appears with Stay/Leave buttons when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.workflows_duplicate_dialog: WORKING - AlertDialog appears with Stay/Leave buttons when closing with unsaved changes
P0-2_unsaved_changes_guard.z_index_100: VERIFIED - Unsaved changes dialogs appear above main dialogs

P2-1_user_role_assignment_bug.default_role: FIXED - Default role is now 'Requester' (was 'Editor' before)
P2-1_user_role_assignment_bug.role_selection: WORKING - Users can select any role and user is created with that role
P2-1_user_role_assignment_bug.role_persistence: VERIFIED - Created user TEST_VideoEditor_User with Video Editor role successfully
